name: @graphorin/benchmark-tool-agent
description: Hermetic tool-use / harness reliability benchmark for the Graphorin framework. Drives the real createAgent(...) loop with a deterministic offline stub provider over a small retail multi-tool task set, scores each run with the trajectory scorers from @graphorin/evals (tool selection, argument validity, redundant calls, error recovery, goal-state), and reports pass^1 / pass^k against a committed baseline so a harness regression fails CI. Fully offline, no model, no network. Created and maintained by Oleksiy Stepurenko.
author: Oleksiy Stepurenko
